# United States Steel’s Board of Directors “Corrects the Record” on Transaction with Nippon Steel

Published at May 21st 2024, 9:47 AM EDT via Business Wire

They reiterated their commitment to cooperating fully with the relevant authorities and expressed confidence that the deal will be completed in the second half of this year. “U.S. Steel and Nippon Steel are committed to, as in the months past, continuing to fully cooperate with the examination of the relevant authorities and are determined to complete the transaction,” the companies stated.", "score": 0.5372119, "raw_content": null}, {"url": "https://gmk.center/en/news/biden-plans-to-block-the-merger-of-nippon-steel-and-us-steel-bloomberg", "title": "Biden plans to block the merger of Nippon Steel and US Steel - Bloomberg", "content": "In early December, Nippon Steel reaffirmed its confidence that the acquisition of US Steel could be completed by the end of 2024 if the deal goes through the proper procedures and is approved by the Biden administration.
